---
title: "Interactive Leaflet Map of Long Island University Brooklyn"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(leaflet)
```

# Welcome!

This webpage was created on **`r Sys.Date()`**.

For this assignment, I created an interactive map using the **Leaflet** package in R. The map highlights the location of **Long Island University Brooklyn**, where I attend school.

```{r}
leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap) %>%
  setView(
    lng = -73.9808,
    lat = 40.6906,
    zoom = 16
  ) %>%
  addMarkers(
    lng = -73.9808,
    lat = 40.6906,
    popup = "<b>Long Island University Brooklyn</b><br>Brooklyn, New York"
  )
```

## About

This interactive map was created with the **Leaflet** package in R and displays the location of Long Island University Brooklyn in New York City.
